meaning: n.<美>酿造后再贮藏成熟的啤酒
examples: It loves the odd can of lager and a barbecue.
Each can of ale or lager contains about 150 calories.
Its website touts Wax Moth Larvae ceviche, with a Brooklyn Lager.
Alongside its vast comfort grub menu, local-made beers include light Lions Gate Lager and velvet-rich Heroica Oatmeal Stout.
This contrasts with, say, Sam Adams Boston Lager at 35 and Pilsner Urquell at 43.
